1.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
1.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa
bear, bring forth (fruit), (be, cause to be, make) fruitful, grow, increase.

1.gl: the trunk or stump of atree (as felled or as planted)
1.dv: from an unused root meaning to cut down (trees);
from H5341 (נָצַר) in the sense of greenness as a striking color;
by Aramaic אִישַׁי; from the same as H3426 (יֵשׁ); extant;

2.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it

2.gl: to rest, i.e. settle down; used in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, intransitive, transitive and causative (to dwell, stay, let fall, place, let alone, withdraw, give comfort, etc.)
2.kj: cease, be confederate, lay, let down, (be) quiet, remain, (cause to, be at, give, have, make to) rest, set down. Compare H3241 (יָנִים).

2.gl: force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory
2.kj: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.
2.dv: feminine passive participle from the same as H1368 (גִּבּוֹר);

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: fear (also used as infinitive); morally, reverence
advice; by implication, plan; also prudence

5.gl: literally firmness; figuratively security; morally fidelity

6.gl: adverb or preposition, with (i.e. in conjunction with), in varied applications; specifically, equally with; often with prepositional prefix (and then usually unrepresented in English)
6.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).

6.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
6.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

6.gl: to drive forth (a person, an animal or chariot), i.e. lead, carry away; reflexively, to proceed (i.e. impel or guide oneself); also (from the panting induced by effort), to sigh
6.kj: acquaint, bring (away), carry away, drive (away), lead (away, forth), (be) guide, lead (away, forth).

6.gl: (concretely) a boy (as active), from the age of infancy to adolescence; by implication, a servant; also (by interch. of sex), a girl (of similar latitude in age)
6.kj: babe, boy, child, damsel (from the margin), lad, servant, young (man).

6.kj: crouch (down), fall down, make a fold, lay, (cause to, make to) lie (down), make to rest, sit.

6.gl: abbreviated, i.e. diminutive, literally (in quantity, size or number) or figuratively (in age or importance)
6.kj: least, less(-er), little (one), small(-est, one, quantity, thing), young(-er, -est).
